SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-27-2011 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF CORRECTION OF PLAINTIFF'S ADDRESS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF BARROS, ALEXANDRE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $0.00) SERVED JUL-12-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT REZENDE, FABIO DBA EASY VISA PLUS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BARROS, ALEXANDRE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT REZENDE, FABIO DBA EASY VISA PLUS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-27-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-27-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
